evals.prompt: 변경된 웹 코드의 접근성을 KWCAG2.2 기준으로 검토해줘
evals.expected_output: kwcag22.md 참조하여 33개 항목 평가, O/X/△/N/A 분류표 생성, HTML+CSV 리포트 출력

assertions.text: All 33 KWCAG2.2 items are evaluated in the report
Semantic HTML review section is included in the report
Found issues include filename:line references
report.html file is generated in outputs directory
report.csv file is generated in outputs directory
Detected missing alt attribute on img in dashboard/page.tsx
Detected icon buttons without aria-label in dashboard/page.tsx
Detected duplicate id='stat-card' issue in StatsCard.tsx
Lighthouse-mapped items (A-01, A-08, A-17, A-23, A-25, A-29, A-32) show verdict method as Lighthouse, not 정적분석
Playwright-target items (A-10, A-11, A-33) show verdict method as Playwright, not 판정불가

evals.prompt: StatsCard.tsx 컴포넌트의 접근성 문제를 KWCAG2.2 기준으로 찾아줘
evals.expected_output: StatsCard.tsx에서 키보드 접근성, 중복 id, ARIA 관련 이슈 식별

assertions.text: All 33 KWCAG2.2 items are evaluated
Detected div onClick without keyboard accessibility
Detected duplicate id='stat-card' when rendered in a list
Each issue is mapped to a specific KWCAG item number
Fix recommendations are provided for each found issue
Lighthouse-mapped items show verdict method as Lighthouse when dev server is running
Playwright-target items (A-10) show verdict method as Playwright when dev server is running

evals.prompt: Navbar.tsx와 SearchFilter.tsx 컴포넌트의 접근성과 시맨틱 HTML 준수 여부를 검토해줘
evals.expected_output: 모바일 메뉴 접근성, 필터 버튼 ARIA 상태, 시맨틱 구조 평가

assertions.text: Detected missing aria-expanded on hamburger menu button
Detected missing aria-pressed on filter toggle buttons
Report includes a dedicated semantic HTML review section
Uses the standard classification system
Fix recommendations are provided for each found issue
Playwright-target items (A-33 aria-expanded/aria-pressed) show verdict method as Playwright when dev server is running
